allow: Bash(node -e "import\('./src/config/index.js'\).then\(m => { const p = m.config.pawapay; console.log\('verifyCallbacks \(payments off\):', p.verifyCallbacks\); }\)")

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; $p = Get-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess; "server PID $\($p.Id\) started: $\($p.StartTime\)"; "misc.routes.js edited: $\(\(Get-Item 'c:\\Users\\gilbe\\Documents\\Work\\Chum v0\\chuma-api\\src\\routes\\misc.routes.js'\).LastWriteTime\)")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; $conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($conn\) { $p = Get-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess; "listening: PID $\($p.Id\) started $\($p.StartTime\)" } else { "port 5000: no listener yet" })
